query: MongoDB Atlas pricing dedicated clusters storage 10TB 2025
answer: MongoDB Atlas dedicated clusters for 10TB storage in 2025 cost around $10,000 annually. Pricing is based on usage and varies by region. Exact rates may change.

Atlas only charges for storage for paused clusters. cloud service provider and cluster affects the available storage. For each cluster with cloud backups enabled, Atlas bills you for:. Atlas cloud backups provides localized backup storage using the native snapshot. To compute the cost for Cloud Backups, Atlas obtains the raw metric data. Atlas can bill backup as high as the total storage capacity of the. (*Atlas Backup Restore Storage* charge). Atlas continues using that backup node for snapshots and snapshot storage. Atlas might charge for backup up to the total storage capacity of the volume, depending. Change the cluster’s backup cloud provider or region. Atlas charges the cluster cost and data storage cost for each. For sharded clusters, Atlas also deploys servers for the config servers; these are charged at a rate separate from the cluster costs.

results.title: MongoDB Pricing
results.snippet: Choosing the right MongoDB Atlas cluster tier for your application involves considering the application's workload, data size, and performance needs. For Dedicated clusters, use Atlas Online Archive to tier infrequently accessed data, which will reduce primary storage costs. results.title: MongoDB Pricing Explained: A 2024 Cost Guide - CloudZero
results.snippet: **Pricing for MongoDB Atlas is usage-based because it charges per hour of cluster usage.** However, several factors affect your MongoDB Atlas costs, including your:. MongoDB Atlas enables you to see the costs of different clusters before you can change them. ## How Much Does MongoDB Cost, Really? MongoDB Atlas prices these capabilities using a tier system; Free Tier, Shared, Dedicated, and Serverless. The MongoDB Atlas free tier is available with M0, M2, and M5 cluster tiers within a sandbox environment, and includes up to 5GB storage, 512 MB RAM shared, and shared vCPU. MongoDB Atlas pricing on AWS is pay-as-you-go, with a free forever tier available for starters. With up to 5GB of storage, shared RAM, and shared CPUs for use on M0, M2, and M5 MongoDB cluster tiers, the MongoDB Atlas Free Tier is free forever.
